strategy: Hit with Fire (+15%); he is Ice and resists Ice 30%.
At the end of every Round, if any Charm or Ward was cast, he steals one from all Wizards (Traps and Stun Blocks count as Wards). Don't leave buffs sitting out.
Protect your key blade with Aegis, or blade and hit in the same round before the end-of-Round steal.
His Natural Attack also steals a Charm and Ward from its target, so re-buff only right before you swing.
Stack an Aegis-protected Fireblade, then finish him in one hit.
cheatNotes: Joining late costs you 1 Pip to a Moon Steal Pips.
At the end of each Round, if any Charm or Ward was cast, he steals one from every Wizard. Blade and hit the same round or use Aegis.
Traps and Stun Blocks count as Wards and trigger the AoE Steal Ward.
Casting Steal Charm or Steal Ward on him does not trigger the cheat.
Aegis protects your charm or ward from the steal.
His Natural Attack also steals a Charm and a Ward from its target.
When he casts Bladestorm or Legion Shield, he pulls a Charm or Ward steal from his minion.
